name: Biker Street
author: Poki
description: Get ready to ride in Biker Street! In this obstacle motorcycle game, you have to make it as far as you can without crashing or running out of gas. As you drive along, more and more tricky obstacles will show up that can be difficult to navigate. Crashed your bike? No worries! With the money you earn each time you ride, you can buy upgrades to improve your bike - making sure your next adventure will be successful! Can you drive all the way to the end of Biker Street? How to play Biker Street? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Who created Biker Street? Biker Street was created by Iriysoft. Play their other game on Poki: Crown Guard , Rush Race Motocross , Moto Maniac and Moto Maniac 2 How can I play Biker Street for free? You can play Biker Street for free on Poki. Can I play Biker Street on mobile devices and desktop? Biker Street can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
